message:
test(tx_execution): clone WeztermHandle before handing it to executor so compensation test can reuse it

In the auto-compensation test, the mock `WeztermHandle` was being moved
into `make_pane_executor(mock as WeztermHandle)` and then the same
binding was used again later in the test to verify which RPCs the
engine issued. That compiled by accident when the mock was `Copy`,
but after it acquired an interior `Arc<...>` field it began producing a
"borrow of moved value" diagnostic and the test could no longer run
end-to-end.

Fix: call `mock.clone() as WeztermHandle` so the executor gets its own
handle and the test retains the original to assert against after the
transaction engine finishes.

No production code is modified; only the one test-case setup line.
